name: Beef Stew with Sun-Dried Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Rehydrate sun-dried tomatoes according to package instructions, then drain and coarsely chop.
2. In a large bowl or container, mix the chopped tomatoes with the remaining ingredients except for 1/4 cup water and the flour.
3. Transfer the mixture into a 3 1/2 to 4 quart Crock Pot.
4. Cover and cook on Low heat setting (8-9 hours) until the vegetables and beef are tender.
5. In a small bowl, mix the 1/4 cup water with the flour. Gradually stir this mixture into the beef mixture in the Crock Pot.
6. Cover and cook on High heat setting (10-15 minutes longer) until slightly thickened.
7. Remove the bay leaf before serving.
Prep Time: 20 minutes
Cooking Time: 9 1/4 hours
Serves: 6
Nutritional Information per Serving: 440 calories, 125g fat, 14g carbohydrates, 70mg cholesterol, 620mg sodium, 57g protein
Diet Exchanges: 3 starch, 2 lean meat, 2 vegetables, 1 fat
Note: Betty Crocker Casseroles and One-Dish Meals #142, p. 74
